name: @spotify-app-cf-demo/spotify-sdk-ai
description: A hand-crafted Spotify Web API SDK designed to be highly usable by humans and AI agents.

scripts.check: node --check src/core.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/operations.js && tsc --noEmit --lib es2022,dom --skipLibCheck src/index.d.ts src/operations.d.ts
